scripts.dev: bun run dev:up && concurrently --kill-others --names docker,tailwind,node1,node2 --prefix-colors magenta,yellow,cyan,green "docker compose logs -f redis postgres haproxy" "bun run dev:tailwind" "bun run dev:node1" "bun run dev:node2"
scripts.dev:node1: cd packages/example && PORT=3000 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 DATABASE_URL=postgres://station:station@localhost:5434/station bun --watch src/index.tsx
scripts.dev:node2: cd packages/example && PORT=3001 REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 DATABASE_URL=postgres://station:station@localhost:5434/station bun --watch src/index.tsx
